title: 2022-2024 Toyota Tundra Engine Oil Change And Filter Replacement Instructions
description: Replace engine oil and filter on 2022-2026 Toyota Tundra models, including skid plate removal, active front spoiler procedure, and oil level check.

items.name: Engine oil pan drain plug gasket 90430-12031

tips: If equipped with active front spoiler, engage it before starting: ignition on, then off, then pull wipers UP (NOT towards you like shown in the video) and hold 2 seconds — do this within 45 seconds of shutting ignition off and don't turn ignition back on until oil change is complete.
Warm up the engine before draining so oil flows faster and drains more completely.
The front skid plate bolts at the front only need to be loosened, not fully removed — slide the plate out.
Use a length of 5/8 inch hose on the oil filter housing nipple to direct draining oil into a container and avoid making a mess on the subframe.
Always install a new drain plug gasket and make sure the old one is fully removed to avoid double-gasketing, which can cause leaks.
The new oil filter seal comes pre-lubricated — no need to apply additional oil.
Tighten the oil filter by hand only; using the filter wrench to tighten makes it very difficult to remove next time.
Apply anti-seize to skid plate bolts before reinstalling.
After filling with oil, run the engine a couple of minutes, then let it sit before checking the dipstick so oil drains back into the pan.
Apply a small amount of oil to the dipstick O-ring to prevent it from getting stuck.
